zh.Thornton in Craven, Yorkshire, England,: 英國英格蘭越可爾桑頓 在 克雷文
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Christopher Lister Esq of Medhope於1486年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾吉斯本時，他的父親Sir William Lister27歲，母親Elizabeth de Banester22歲。他於1512年4月2日與Lady Eleanor Clayton結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1548年9月在英國英格蘭越可爾桑頓 在 克雷文享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾吉斯本。

nameMeanings.name: Lister
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer of cloth, Middle English li(te)ster, a derivative of Middle English lit(t)en (Old Norse lita) ‘to dye’. This term was used principally in East Anglia and northern and eastern England (areas of Scandinavian settlement), and to this day the surname is found principally in these regions, especially in Yorkshire.

variants.name: Lester
meanings: English: habitational name from Leicester, which is recorded as Ligeraceastre in the 10th century. The placename derives from an Old English folk name Legore ‘the dwellers by the river Legor (a lost river name)’ + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lestre in Normandy.
English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .

variants.name: Lyster
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Ljøsta in Romsdal, probably derived from Old Norse ljóstr ‘fishing spear, leister’.
Danish: nickname originally from Bornholm, derived from a word for a fishing tackle for catching eel.

variants.name: Lidster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

variants.name: Litster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

nameMeanings.name: Christopher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Christopher Lister Esq of Medhope was born in 1486, in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Lister, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth de Banester, was 22. He married Lady Eleanor Clayton on 2 April 1512. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. He died in September 1548, in Thornton in Craven, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Thornton in Craven, Yorkshire, England,: Thornton in Craven, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Christopher Lister Esq of Medhope est né en 1486, à Gisburn, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Lister, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Banester, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Eleanor Clayton le 2 avril 1512. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en septembre 1548, à Thornton in Craven, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Gisburn, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Thornton in Craven, Yorkshire, England,: Thornton in Craven, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Christopher Lister Esq of Medhope 1486 in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Lister 27 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Banester 22. Er hat am 2. April 1512 Lady Eleanor Clayton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Er starb im September 1548 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Thornton in Craven, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Christopher Lister Esq of Medhope è nato il nel 1486 nel Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William Lister, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Banester, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lady Eleanor Clayton il 2 aprile 1512. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Morì nel settembre 1548, nel Thornton in Craven, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Christopher Lister Esq of Medhopeが1486年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアギスブルンで生まれた時，父Sir William Listerは27歳，母Elizabeth de Banesterは22歳であった。1512年4月2日にLady Eleanor Claytonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1548年9月にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアソルントン イン クラベンで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアギスブルンにて埋葬された。

ko.Thornton in Craven, Yorkshire, England,: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 토른턴 인 크레이븐
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Christopher Lister Esq of Medhope(이)가 1486년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 지스번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Lister(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Banester(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1512년 4월 2일 Lady Eleanor Clayton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1548년 9월 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 토른턴 인 크레이븐에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 지스번에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Christopher Lister Esq of Medhope nasceu em 1486, em Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Lister, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Banester, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Eleanor Clayton em 2 de abril de 1512. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em setembro de 1548, em Thornton in Craven, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Thornton in Craven, Yorkshire, England,: таурнтон ин кравен, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Christopher Lister Esq of Medhope родился в 1486 г. в местности гисбурн, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Lister было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Banester, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Eleanor Clayton 2 апреля 1512 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Он умер сентябрь 1548 г. в местности таурнтон ин кравен, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности гисбурн, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
